title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: - **Failure:** `auth-stale` shows reconnect, but gateway mode (`access-only` / `password-only` / `dual`) is not explicit enough at decision time. **Impact:** users pick wrong path or loop between screens, delaying recovery. **Detect via contract/UI:** status strip + `/happy/auth` must always show one primary path reason and one fallback reason; enforce with gateway runtime test plus copy contract. - **Failure:** auth config drift leaves no valid reauth route (`dead-end`) in production. **Impact:** mobile control surface becomes unusable after token expiry. **Detect via contract/UI:** startup/runtime contract must fail when `authEntryUrl/authAccessUrl/authLoginEndpoint` are all missing; UI must render a hard error state with operator action. - **Failure:** high-priority tasks get buried when task volume grows (filters + compact cards hide `needs-human` urgency). **Impact:** human-gate tasks are missed, causing operational delays or unsafe automation continuation. **Detect via contract/UI:** behavior contract with large mixed task set must assert top-of-list pinning/escalation badges for `needs-human` and stale/degraded tasks. - **Failure:** natural-language follow-ups are sent from global composer without task binding. **Impact:** instructions apply to wrong task/session, creating cross-task state corruption. **Detect via contract/UI:** task sheet must provide per-task NL compose bound to `task_id/parent_task_id`; contract test should fail if task-scoped packet fields are absent. - **Failure:** communication actions (issue comment posted, approval requested, escalation sent) are not first-class per-task events. **Impact:** operators cannot verify whether Kernel actually notified humans/systems. **Detect via contract/UI:** per-task timeline contract requiring communication event types + delivery state (`queued/sent/failed`) visible in task sheet. - **Failure:** no spend/token visibility in mobile UI. **Impact:** runaway model/API cost is discovered only after budget or quota impact. **Detect via contract/UI:** state schema and UI contract must require cost summary + threshold alert surfaces (global and per-task), with behavior tests that trigger warning/escalation on threshold breach.
